case_title: VICTOR MARSHALL VS. DHS PRIVATE SECURITY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2020 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION CHAGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, VICTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-13-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DHS PRIVATE SECURITY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF VICTOR MARSHALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DHS PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. - RETURN MAIL, SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAITIFF, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
